evals.prompt: Is LaunchVibe worth submitting to? How does it compare to other instant-listing directories?
evals.expected_output: Acknowledges DR10 is low, recommends submitting because it's free and dofollow, compares with similar platforms.

assertions.name: low_dr
assertions.description: Acknowledges that LaunchVibe's DR is very low (around 10) compared to other directories and sets realistic expectations for SEO value

assertions.name: still_worth_it
assertions.description: Recommends submitting anyway because it's free, instant, and provides a dofollow backlink — every cumulative backlink helps

assertions.name: comparison
assertions.description: Compares with at least one other instant-listing directory like ProductBurst, SoloPush, or Huzzler to provide context on relative backlink value

evals.prompt: How do I submit my SaaS product to LaunchVibe and maximize my visibility there?
evals.expected_output: Walks through the submission process and explains the XP system for gaining visibility.

assertions.name: submission_process
assertions.description: Explains creating an account at launchvibe.app and submitting with a working product URL, description, and screenshots

assertions.name: xp_system
assertions.description: Explains the XP gamification system where launching, commenting, and upvoting earn experience points that build reputation and visibility

assertions.name: engagement_strategy
assertions.description: Recommends active community engagement (commenting on other launches, maintaining streaks) rather than passive submission

evals.prompt: Where does LaunchVibe fit in a multi-directory launch strategy?
evals.expected_output: Places LaunchVibe in Phase 1 instant listings alongside similar platforms.

assertions.name: phase_placement
assertions.description: Places LaunchVibe in the instant-listing phase rather than editorial-queue or paid fast-track phases

assertions.name: low_priority_seo
assertions.description: Notes that LaunchVibe should not be prioritized for SEO/backlink value due to low DR, but is worth including as a free instant submission

assertions.name: pair_with
assertions.description: Recommends pairing with other instant-listing directories like SoloPush, ProductBurst, or JustGotFound
